reviews.review_title: It could be better for us on VR
reviews.review_description: It's a good game but they need to UPDATE & ADD where we can interact with the furniture ETC. & THANGS SO we can use the furniture I hope they do a big UPDATE & ADD SOME GREAT THINGS TO THIS GAME I LIKE THE GAME A LOT BUT FOR VR IT COULD  BE WAYY BETTER make it better and even make it like the other review says make it the same way great on META QUEST like the STEAM or whatever DEVICES ITS ON DONT TAKE AWAY FROM META QUEST GIVE US META QUEST VR THE SAME ENERGY/TIME YALL DID FOR THE OTHER GAME DEVICES PLEASE & THANK U MAKE IT ALL THE WAY IMMERSIVE FOR THE VIRTUAL REALITY LET US INTERACT WITH EVERYTHING ON BUILDER SIMULATOR PLEASE GOD BLESS

reviews.review_title: how do i get stuff off the towel.
reviews.review_description: this games fun and i love building but only problem i have is thst i cant replace doors/windows when i choose the wrong 1 or when im done building the walls and still have mortar left on the towel and cant remove it

This version has playstation 1 graphics i thought my quest 3 was the oculus go definitely needs visual upgrade... it's definitely a learning curve as it's made to be more realistic so if u like sims stuff this ain't for u there's more serious to this from scratch.... i think the walking is too slow it needs to be faster and not using sprint either.. also the back pack is real sensitive to pull it it can get annoying if u hit grip button on accident..only 7x7 and 13x13 sizes that I see i think few more sizes is needed and perhaps a weather cycle day and night..hopefully u add co op mode ... for now with them visuals to me the steam version looks better so prolly refund for now and grab ur steam version instead for time being... also u need to fix on how to find this app that's why no reviews u have to capital the B and the S and then put vr after for this to show in store otherwise it won't pop up... it has potential though if u like this kind of stuff  nothing like it on stand alone that's forsure
